tagged_story_for_tts:
"Men aren’t the oppressors—they’re the system’s most disposable pawns.<[silence:400]>

The myth? That patriarchy rewards all men.<[silence:400]> The truth? 95% of workplace deaths, 78% of suicides, and 93% of prison sentences are male (OSHA, WHO, BJS).<[silence:400]> The bargain was never power—it was utility.<[silence:400]> Drafted into wars, buried in mines, ground into corporate cogs, then shamed for cracking under the weight.<[silence:400]> Even "male privilege" is a conditional lease:<[silence:100]> fail to provide, protect, or perform, and watch how fast society revokes your manhood.<[silence:400]>

The paradox? The same system that demands their sacrifice hates them for needing help.<[silence:400]> Therapy? 'Weak.' Vulnerability? 'Unmanly.' The result? Loneliness as the default male experience—1 in 4 men have no close friends (Survey Center on American Life, 2021), while women’s support networks expand.<[silence:400]> The ultimate joke? Men built the cages and locked themselves inside.<[silence:400]>

Still think this is a gender war you’re winning?"
clean_story:
"Men aren’t the oppressors—they’re the system’s most disposable pawns.

The myth? That patriarchy rewards all men. The truth? 95% of workplace deaths, 78% of suicides, and 93% of prison sentences are male (OSHA, WHO, BJS). The bargain was never power—it was utility. Drafted into wars, buried in mines, ground into corporate cogs, then shamed for cracking under the weight. Even "male privilege" is a conditional lease: fail to provide, protect, or perform, and watch how fast society revokes your manhood.

The paradox? The same system that demands their sacrifice hates them for needing help. Therapy? 'Weak.' Vulnerability? 'Unmanly.' The result? Loneliness as the default male experience—1 in 4 men have no close friends (Survey Center on American Life, 2021), while women’s support networks expand. The ultimate joke? Men built the cages and locked themselves inside.

Still think this is a gender war you’re winning?"
